lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Twelfth consecutive report. This cycle a full v0.4.0 polish pass landed in the working tree (new Toast/Skeleton/Spinner components, ~35 modified files, package.json bumped to 0.4.0, matching CHANGELOG entry), so the release is finally runnable and the pre-flight version guard would pass for the first time. But it is all uncommitted (last commit still b41b853, nine days back) and every prior blocker rode through: the Discord webhook is still tracked and un-gitignored (HIGH, twelfth cycle), both release scripts still carry a UTF-8 BOM and a mojibake em-dash regex that would post raw em-dashes to Discord, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes the M2 milestone and nulls the barRaise block on release. New this cycle: DESIGN.md still reads v0.3.0 while package.json and CHANGELOG read v0.4.0.
